Line 374:  
Line 375:  WriteLiteral(@"></div>
Line 376:  <style>
Line 377:      .t-grid-content tr > td:hover .menu_block + .display_menu {
Line 378:          display: block !important;
Line 379:      }
Line 380:  
Line 381:      .display_menu {
Line 382:          left: 65px;
Line 383:          overflow: visible;
Line 384:          position: absolute;
Line 385:          top: -5px;
Line 386:          background: #fff;
Line 387:          border: 1px solid #ddd;
Line 388:          z-index: 100;
Line 389:      }
Line 390:  
Line 391:      .t-grid-content tr > td {
Line 392:          overflow: visible !important;
Line 393:          position: relative;
Line 394:      }
Line 395:  
Line 396:      .display_menu > ul {
Line 397:          padding: 0 16px;
Line 398:      }
Line 399:  
Line 400:      .display_menu li {
Line 401:          list-style: none outside none;
Line 402:          width: 143px;
Line 403:      }
Line 404:  </style>
Line 405:  <script");

Line 430:  
Line 431:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 4491, 23, true);
Line 432:  
Line 433:  WriteLiteral(" type=\"text/javascript\"");
Line 434:  
Line 435:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 4491, 23, true);
Line 436:  
Line 437:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 4514, 1228, true);
Line 438:  
Line 439:  WriteLiteral(@">
Line 440:      $(function () {
Line 441:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 442:          $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 443:              autoOpen: false
Line 444:          });
Line 445:          $('#popup').bind('dialogclose', function (event) {
Line 446:              window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 447:          });
Line 448:      });
Line 449:  
Line 450:      function CloseMe() {
Line 451:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('close');
Line 452:          //$("".t-icon .t-refresh"").trigger('click');
Line 453:  
Line 454:          window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 455:      }
Line 456:      function OpenEmailDialog(ac) {
Line 457:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 458:  
Line 459:          $.get(""/WrongContact/Index"", { accessCode: ac }, function (data) {
Line 460:  
Line 461:              $(""#EmailDialog"").html(data);
Line 462:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 463:                  width: 1200,
Line 464:                  height: 1000,
Line 465:              });
Line 466:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog('open');
Line 467:          });
Line 468:      }
Line 469:      $('#menu_block').hover(function () {
Line 470:          // alert(""call"");
Line 471:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 472:      }, function () {
Line 473:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 474:      })
Line 475:  
Line 476:      $('#menu_block').mouseenter(function () {
Line 477:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 478:      }).mouseleave(function () {
Line 479:  
Line 480:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 481:  
Line 482:      });
Line 483:  
Line 484:      function openEditPopup(id) {
Line 485:          $.get(""");
Line 486:  
Line 487:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 4514, 1228, true);
Line 488:  
Line 489:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 5743, 53, false);
Line 490:  
Line 491:              
Line 492:              #line 159 "C:\Users\john\Desktop\hs3MVC_Latest\Generic\Views\Questionnaire\QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml"
Line 493:            Write(Url.Content("~/Questionnaire/EditQuestionCMSDetail/"));
Line 494:  
Line 495:              
Line 496:              #line default
Line 497:              #line hidden
Line 498:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 5743, 53, false);
Line 499:  
Line 500:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 5796, 732, true);
Line 501:  
Line 502:  WriteLiteral(@""" + id, function (data) {
Line 503:              $(""#genericPopup"").html(data);
Line 504:          });
Line 505:  
Line 506:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog({ height: 600, title: ""Edit/Correct"" });
Line 507:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('open');
Line 508:      }
Line 509:  
Line 510:      function openRemovePopup(id, name) {
Line 511:  
Line 512:  
Line 513:  
Line 514:          alertify.set({
Line 515:              labels: {
Line 516:                  ok: ""No"",
Line 517:                  cancel: ""Yes""
Line 518:              },
Line 519:              buttonFocus: ""cancel""
Line 520:          });
Line 521:          // button labels will be ""Accept"" and ""Deny""
Line 522:          alertify.confirm(""You are about to Remove : "" + name + "". Are you sure you want to do this?"", function (e) {
Line 523:              if (e) {
Line 524:                  // Click no
Line 525:              } else {
Line 526:                  // click yes
Line 527:  
Line 528:                  $.get(""");
Line 529:  
Line 530:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 5796, 732, true);
Line 531:  
Line 532:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 6529, 56, false);
Line 533:  
Line 534:              
Line 535:              #line 185 "C:\Users\john\Desktop\hs3MVC_Latest\Generic\Views\Questionnaire\QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml"
Line 536:                    Write(Url.Content("~/Questionnaire/ArchiveQuestionCMSDetail/"));
Line 537:  
Line 538:              
Line 539:              #line default
Line 540:              #line hidden
Line 541:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 6529, 56, false);
Line 542:  
Line 543:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 6585, 746, true);
Line 544:  
Line 545:  WriteLiteral(@""" + id, function (data) {
Line 546:                      // $("".t-icon .t-refresh"").trigger('click');
Line 547:                      window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 548:                  });
Line 549:  
Line 550:              }
Line 551:          });
Line 552:  
Line 553:  
Line 554:      }
Line 555:  
Line 556:  
Line 557:      function openArchivePopup(id, name) {
Line 558:  
Line 559:  
Line 560:  
Line 561:          alertify.set({
Line 562:              labels: {
Line 563:                  ok: ""No"",
Line 564:                  cancel: ""Yes""
Line 565:              },
Line 566:              buttonFocus: ""cancel""
Line 567:          });
Line 568:          // button labels will be ""Accept"" and ""Deny""
Line 569:          alertify.confirm(""You are about to Archive : "" + name + "". Are you sure you want to do this?"", function (e) {
Line 570:              if (e) {
Line 571:                  // Click no
Line 572:              } else {
Line 573:                  // click yes
Line 574:  
Line 575:                  $.get(""");
Line 576:  
Line 577:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 6585, 746, true);
Line 578:  
Line 579:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/QuestionnaireQuestionnaireCMS.cshtml", 7332, 56, false);
